field_values.action_summary: While on a solo flight, Carter witnesses three Green Warriors attacking a Zodangan air scout (a relative of the Jeddak). Carter intervenes in the aerial combat, killing the warriors and saving the scout.
field_values.camera_intent: Dynamic aerial combat shots; Fast-paced cutting; Close-ups of struggle and kill
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Flight trajectories of all four vessels
Damage states to the zodangan_scout vessel
Relative positioning of green_warriors to the scout
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH021_SC005

## Production Intent
Demonstrate the superhuman physical capabilities of john_carter through high-velocity aerial combat. The sequence must emphasize the scale of the Martian atmosphere and the kinetic energy of mid-air interception to establish Carter as a dominant force in Zodangan airspace.

## Required Cast
- john_carter
- green_warriors
- zodangan_scout

## Required Environments
- zodanga_central_plaza (upper_atmosphere)

## Continuity Constraints
- Flight trajectories of all four vessels
- Damage states to the zodangan_scout vessel
- Relative positioning of green_warriors to the scout

## Beat List
- BT001: Observation of the attack
- BT002: High-stakes combat intervention
- BT003: Triumph and rescue
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
